tools.name: search_cars
tools.description: Search for cars on coches.net. Pass the user's full query AND extract any filters explicitly mentioned into their dedicated fields — do NOT infer or guess filter values. If the user mentions a location, extract it into the 'location' field instead of leaving it only in the query. Supported filters: brand, model, version (trim level, e.g. 'Avant', 'AMG Line'), fuelType (diesel/gasolina/electrico/hibrido), priceMin, priceMax, year (min year), yearTo (max year), kmFrom, kmMax, color (azul/negro/blanco/rojo/gris/verde/marron/beige/naranja/amarillo/granate/violeta/rosa), transmission (manual/automatico), location (Spanish province or city name, e.g. 'Barcelona', 'Madrid'), radiusKm.
